calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul H. Melbostad for and with Eva Marie Santos, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Douglas A. Applegate for Kemp & Associates, Assignee (via Zoom).

The court inquired whether there were any objections to the petition. Mr. Melbostad stated he had not heard of any objections.

Mr. Melbostad explained that the imbalance in the estate accounting was likely due to gains from the Apple stock, calculated based on 1099s. He noted that the stock had increased in value from the date of death to the date of sale, which may explain the discrepancy. Mr. Applegate commented that the imbalance, given the overall size of the estate, was not significant enough to raise concerns. He confirmed that he had no objections.

The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant the petition and accept but not approve the final accounting.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition To Determine Heirship (Probate Code Section 11700) And For Order To Increase Bond
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Continued To Feb-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Continued To Jan-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad, via Zoom, for Eva Marie Santos, Administrator; Douglas Applegate, via Zoom, for Kemp & Associates, Petitioner.

The court points to the lack of progress in this matter. Mr. Applegate advises of the idea to obtain small estate affidavits from the heirs. The court queries Mr. Melbostad as to why the court should keep this petition on calendar. Mr. Melbostad confirms the idea to obtain small estate affidavits from the heirs to be filed with the court and reports that he has sought outside help from attorney Dennis Messina to assist him with obtaining an agreement from all Filipino heirs. Mr. Melbostad advises of attempts to provide notice to Michaelangelo Santos via mail and email, but the mail was returned to him with a note stating that it was refused and that there has been no response to his email. Mr. Melbostatd reports that he does intend to file an amended petition but that the timing of the filing depends on how long it takes Mr. Messina to confirm the settlement agreement for the Filipino heirs. The court notes the number of times this matter has been previously called and that it will need to see progress by the next calling and would prefer that the amended petition be filed by then.

The subject matters are continued to Jan-10-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Heirship (Probate Code Section 11700) And For Order To Increase Bond
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Continued To Jan-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melobostad, via Zoom, for and with Eva Santos, Administrator.

The court points to the issue of service to Michaelangelo Santos via email. Mr. Melobostad advises that he currently does not have a mailing address for Mr. Santos. Ms. Santos reports that she has not spoken to Mr. Santos (her brother) for many years now but knows through family sources that he now resides in Japan. The court advises that it will expect service to Mr. Santos pursuant to court rules or verified showing of the efforts made to locate and serve Mr. Santos. Mr. Melbostad advises of the intent to file an amended petition and mentions contacting an attorney in the Philippines to assist him with Philippine laws and rules regarding probate. The court advises Mr. Melbostad that filing a document regarding the preceding would be beneficial to the court. Mr. Melbostad reports of not having an update regarding the Kekahuna heirs but that he has been in contact with Douglas Applegate and was advised that he is amenable to filing something to update the court regarding that matter. The court instructs Mr. Melbostad to contact Mr. Applegate to the discuss the preceding, prior to the next calling of this matter.

The two matters set for hearing are continued to Oct-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-06-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad, via ZOOM, for Eva Santos, via ZOOM, Administrator.

The court begins by querying counsel as to the status of the proof of service regarding the status petition. Counsel reports that he has been unable to locate original proof of service. Counsel then reports that the additional bond has been filed and that a Petition to Determine Heirship has been filed with a July 27, 2021, hearing date. The court then confirms with counsel that no objections regarding the heirship petition are expected.

After additional discussion, the Status of Filing of Additional Bond and Petition for Approval of Report are taken off calendar in open court. A Status on Close of Estate is set for July 27, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Continued To Jun-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad, via ZOOM, counsel for Eva Santos, Administrator.

At the outset, the court queries counsel as to the status of the case as this matter is close to being three (3) years old. Mr. Melobostad reports that the case against the insurance company did not settle at its settlement conference so he now plans to file a petition for preliminary distribution and requests a continuance to prepare the petition. The court also mentions that it will be requiring an additional bond of $482,000.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to June 8, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Additionally, Status of filing of a Petition to Determine Heirs and Status of filing of Additional Bond are set for the same date and time, with a deadline of June 01, 2021, for the filing of both. Mr. Melbostad is to provide notice to all of Mr. Applegate's clients.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-17-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad appeared by telephone for Eva Santos (Administrator).

Mr. Melbostad stated that he filed a status report on final distribution, but he did not title it petition and that he is in communication with the other paternal heir's Attorney Mr. Applegate. Mr. Melbostad also stated that they both will be filing a petition to determine heirs, that he provided the fee agreement to Mr. Applegate and that this was a challenging case. Status on close of estate is continued to September 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Approval for Administrator to Enter into Contingent Fee Agreement with Her Attorney for Extraordinary Litigation Services is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Continued To Aug-17-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad appeared by telephone for Eva Marie Santos.

Mr. Melbostad apologized to the Court stating that the last hearing did not get put on his calendar. Mr. Melbostad also stated that they have not filed a petition because the Heir Hunter found heirs on the paternal side that the family was not aware of, that they need to file a law suit against the accidental death insurance company, that they are in the process of entering into a contingency fee agreement to bring the law suit and that it is a $320,000.00 policy. In addition, Mr. Melbostad stated that the local rules require a separate petition for authority to hire Litigation Counsel. The Court informed Mr. Melbostad that he needs to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to August 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.
